testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-profile > renders profile and preferences forms with translated labels and DOM validation state
@stynx-web/angular-profile > renders the security handoff surface and opens hosted auth actions from buttons
@stynx-web/angular-profile > navigates profile routes to the shipped standalone components
@stynx-web/angular-profile > validates the profile form and emits only when dirty and valid
@stynx-web/angular-profile > applies profile defaults, display-name fallback, and validator contracts exactly
@stynx-web/angular-profile > saves profile changes through ProfileService and reports failures
@stynx-web/angular-profile > tracks dirty state in the preferences form
@stynx-web/angular-profile > applies preference defaults and changes locale only for new non-empty values without a service
@stynx-web/angular-profile > saves preferences through ProfileService, changes locale, and reports failures
@stynx-web/angular-profile > opens the configured change-password hosted action
@stynx-web/angular-profile > marks MFA enrolment unavailable when no hosted action URL is configured
@stynx-web/angular-profile > reports hosted action configuration errors to the standard error banner
